evidence.evidence_text: The average crystallite size of TiO NPs were estimated using 2 Scherrer’s equation, t=0.9l/βcosθ, where l is the X-ray wavelength, β the full width at half maximum (FWHM) of the peak and θ the Bragg’s angle.
